postToolUse.bash:
payload=$(cat); tool_name=$(printf '%s
' "$payload" | jq -r '.toolName // empty'); if printf '%s' "$tool_name" | grep -qiE '^(create|write|edit|multiedit|apply_patch)$'; then f=$(printf '%s
' "$payload" | jq -r '.toolArgs | def parsed: if type == "string" then (fromjson? // .) else . end; parsed | if type == "object" then [.path?, .file_path?, .filePath?] | map(select(type == "string" and test("\.md$"))) | .[]? elif type == "string" then split("
")[] | select(test("^\*\*\* (Add File|Update File|Move to): .*\.md$")) | sub("^\*\*\* (Add File|Update File|Move to): "; "") else empty end' | sort -u); if [ -n "$f" ]; then printf '%s
' "$f" | xargs -r mo; fi; fi
